board.name: Weekly Meal Prep & Recipe Queue
board.description: Organize weekly cooking schedule, manage pantry inventory, and test new recipes. Goal: cook five dinners at home per week and reduce takeout to once a week.

tasks.name: Monday: creamy tomato basil pasta
tasks.description: Use canned San Marzano tomatoes. Add fresh basil from windowsill plant. Serve with garlic bread.

tasks.name: Wednesday: sheet pan lemon chicken
tasks.description: Chicken thighs with potatoes and asparagus. Marinate overnight in lemon herb vinaigrette.

tasks.name: Friday: homemade pizza night
tasks.description: Cold-ferment dough for 48 hours. Toppings: pepperoni, mushrooms, bell peppers.

tasks.name: Weekly produce run
tasks.description: Need: romaine lettuce, tomatoes, avocados, lemons, garlic, ginger, cilantro. Check what is in season.

tasks.name: Restock spices
tasks.description: Running low on cumin, smoked paprika, and cayenne. Buy from bulk section to refill jars.

tasks.name: Buy protein for the week
tasks.description: Chicken thighs (2 lbs), ground beef (1 lb), salmon fillets (2), eggs (18-pack). Freeze what not using within 3 days.

tasks.name: Pick up fresh herbs
tasks.description: Need basil for Monday pasta, cilantro for Wednesday chicken, rosemary for Sunday roast.

tasks.name: Thai green curry from scratch
tasks.description: Make curry paste with mortar and pestle. Use coconut cream not milk for richer sauce.

tasks.name: Sourdough starter maintenance
tasks.description: Feed starter twice daily if baking this weekend. Discard 50g, feed 100g flour and 100g water.

tasks.name: Homemade ramen broth
tasks.description: Pressure cooker tonkotsu broth. Need pork bones, aromatics. Simmer for 4 hours minimum.

tasks.name: Attempt croissants from scratch
tasks.description: Lamination process requires patience. Need to keep butter block at exactly 60°F. Plan for a full Saturday.

tasks.name: Perfect jollof rice recipe
tasks.description: Friend shared their family recipe. Need to source proper scotch bonnet and smoked paprika.

tasks.name: Wash and chop vegetables
tasks.description: Dice onions, mince garlic, chop bell peppers. Store in separate containers lined with paper towel.

tasks.name: Cook grains for the week
tasks.description: Batch cook quinoa (2 cups), brown rice (2 cups). Cool completely before refrigerating.

tasks.name: Make dressing and sauces
tasks.description: Lemon vinaigrette, tahini sauce, and yogurt dill sauce. Store in mason jars for easy pouring.

tasks.name: Deep clean refrigerator
tasks.description: Remove all shelves and drawers. Wash with baking soda solution. Check all condiment expiration dates.

tasks.name: Sharpen knives
tasks.description: Use 1000/6000 grit whetstone. Chef's knife and pairing knife need sharpening. Test on paper.

tasks.name: Clean oven
tasks.description: Self-clean cycle overnight. Wipe out ash in the morning. Clean oven racks separately.

tasks.name: Season cast iron skillet
tasks.description: After cleaning, apply thin layer of flaxseed oil. Bake upside down at 450°F for one hour.

tasks.name: Monday pasta leftovers for Tuesday lunch
tasks.description: Pack into portion containers immediately after cooking. Reheat with splash of water to restore sauce consistency.
